creator: ssqg02@ssqg.net
text:
I tried to re-build java/openjdk7 with clang'ed current system and fresh portsnap'ed ports. Building openjdk7 has been finished successfully without any errors and warnings.

On Thu, 22 Nov 2012 04:01:05 GMT
glewis@FreeBSD.org wrote:

> Synopsis: java/openjdk7 build failed with segmentation fault(core dumped)
> 
> State-Changed-From-To: open->feedback
> State-Changed-By: glewis
> State-Changed-When: Thu Nov 22 04:00:31 UTC 2012
> State-Changed-Why: 
> Is this reproducible?  Particularly with the latest version of the port.
> 
> http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=170589


-- 
Takuya Harada <tharada@e-mail.jp>
